{% extends "!footer.html" %} {%- block contentinfo %}

{%- if show_copyright %} {%- if hasdoc('copyright') %} © Copyright {{ copyright|safe }}. {%- else %} © Copyright {{ copyright|safe }}. {%- endif %} {%- endif %} {%- if build_id and build_url %} {%- trans %}Build{% endtrans -%} {{ build_id }}. {%- elif commit %} {%- trans %}Revision{% endtrans %} {{ commit }}. {%- endif %} {%- if last_updated %} {%- trans last_updated=last_updated|e %}Last updated on {{ last_updated }}.{% endtrans %} {%- endif -%}

{%- endblock %}
